H

handle() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.ClientHandler
This method is used to handle the connection with the client.
handle(ClientHandler, MessageToServer) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.MultipleMatchesHandler
the handle method calls the decodeAndExecute method giving him the ClientHandler who sent the message and the controller associated, in case of TCP connection.
handleGame() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.GUIView
This method is used to handle the game.
handleGame() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.TUI.TUIView
This method handles all the game.
handleGame() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.View
This method is used to handle the game and is implemented in the TUIView and GUIView classes.
hasBlackToken() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSidePlayer
Getter of the hasBlackToken boolean.
